svg.text: Transfer learning · MobileNet V2 640 · Gold Medal FYP

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me about the Berkeley DeepDrive dataset')
sendPrompt('What is MobileNet V2 640 and why was it chosen?')
sendPrompt('How does transfer learning work for object detection?')
sendPrompt('What does the trained detection model output?')
sendPrompt('Why was Raspberry Pi chosen as the hardware platform?')
sendPrompt('How does near real-time inference work on edge hardware?')
sendPrompt('How are vehicles detected in traffic scenes?')
sendPrompt('How are pedestrians detected in traffic footage?')
sendPrompt('How is weather condition classified from camera frames?')
sendPrompt('How is scene brightness captured and recorded?')
sendPrompt('What format was the collected traffic data saved in?')
